meta.title: Security Agency | Professional Protection
meta.description: Reliable security and protection for your business and property. 24/7 monitoring, facility protection, cyber defense.

hero.title: Absolute Control.
hero.subtitle: Next-generation professional security and defense. 24/7 monitoring, tactical response, and cyber protection of your assets.

about.title: Experience You Can Trust
about.description: We provide comprehensive protection for facilities of any complexity. Our team consists of experienced professionals with military and law enforcement backgrounds.

items.title: Physical Security
items.description: Professional armed and unarmed facility, event, and personal protection with 24/7 coverage.

items.title: Video Surveillance
items.description: Installation and maintenance of CCTV systems with remote access and AI-powered analytics.

items.title: Panic Button
items.description: Instant rapid response team deployment within 3-5 minutes anywhere in the city.

items.title: Cyber Defense
items.description: Protection of information systems, network infrastructure, and personal data from cyber threats.

items.title: Alarm Monitoring
items.description: 24/7 facility monitoring through central observation station with automatic alerts.

items.title: Security Consulting
items.description: Vulnerability audits, security strategy development, and staff training on protection protocols.

items.title: Modern Equipment
items.description: We use the latest security technologies

items.title: Expert Team
items.description: Specialists with military and police backgrounds

items.title: Transparent Reporting
items.description: Monthly reports and monitoring system access

steps.title: Analysis
steps.description: We conduct a detailed facility audit to identify potential threats and vulnerabilities.

steps.title: Planning
steps.description: We develop an individual security strategy considering facility specifics.

steps.title: Implementation
steps.description: We install equipment, train personnel, and launch the security system.

steps.title: Monitoring
steps.description: We provide 24/7 control and rapid threat response.
